exercise.description: Check Analytical Jacobian (ZYZ) via symbolic differentiation

variables.description: Check if Ja is a 6x6 numerical matrix
variables.name: exist('Ja','var') && ismatrix(Ja) && isequal(size(Ja),[6,6]) && isa(Ja,'double')
variables.output_fail: Ja is missing or has incorrect type/size

variables.description: Check if Rank is a numerical scalar
variables.name: exist('Rank','var') && isscalar(Rank) && isa(Rank,'double')
variables.output_fail: Rank is missing or has incorrect type

tests.name: all(abs(Ja(:) - Ja_expected(:)) < 1e-4) && (Rank == 6)
tests.description: Check Analytical Jacobian vs geometricJacobian-derived expected and rank
tests.output_ok: [OK] Analytical Jacobian matches expected and rank is 6
tests.output_fail: [FAIL] Analytical Jacobian does not match or rank is incorrect
